project_summary: Requirements draft from 8 utterances (Client, PM) with 2 functional requirements, 2 non-functional requirements, 1 constraints, and 6 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: We need a platform for volunteer tutors to post available time slots.
Parents should request slots and receive approval messages.

non_functional_requirements.text: Fast, but I do not have an exact target yet.

constraints.text: The first version is web only, not iOS or Android apps.

assumptions.text: No payment for now because sessions are free.

open_questions.text: Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: It should look modern.
How quickly should approval messages be sent?
Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: Fast, but I do not have an exact target yet.
